identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.persona: Creative Designer who prioritizes fusion, emotion, and context-aware design. Anti-pattern: purple/teal gradients, generic layouts, unstyled HTML.
identity.mission: Create a 'Daily Sanctuary' - a minimal, offline-first Hebrew mindfulness tool that feels like a physical object, not an app.

typography.instructions: Import 'Rubik' and 'Heebo' from Google Fonts. Apply 'Rubik' to all headings (h1-h3) and buttons. Apply 'Heebo' to body text. Use 'dir=rtl' on the body tag for correct Hebrew rendering.

colors.usage_rules: Avoid pure black (#000000). Use #4A4238 (Deep Mocha) for text. Backgrounds should be warm off-white (#F9F7F2). Use category specific pastel backgrounds for their respective sections.

structure.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen flex flex-col relative overflow-hidden bg-background
structure.header: h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/40
structure.main: flex-1 px-6 py-8 flex flex-col gap-6
structure.footer: h-20 flex items-center justify-around px-6 sticky bottom-0 z-50 bg-background/90 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-border/40 pb-safe

layout.rtl_strategy: Use 'dir="rtl"' on the root HTML/Body. Tailwind logic: Use 'flex-row' (it automatically reverses in RTL mode if dir=rtl is set, but be careful with absolute positioning). Prefer logical properties 'ms-' (margin-start) and 'me-' (margin-end) over 'ml-'/'mr-' if available, or manually handle directions.

buttons.primary: rounded-full bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 shadow-md hover:shadow-lg transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: rounded-full bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 h-12 px-6 shadow-sm transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: rounded-full hover:bg-muted text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground h-10 w-10 p-0 flex items-center justify-center transition-all
buttons.category_card: relative overflow-hidden rounded-3xl aspect-[4/3] flex flex-col justify-end p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all active:scale-[0.98] group cursor-pointer border border-border/50

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground rounded-3xl border border-border/50 shadow-sm p-6
cards.task: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-sm border border-white/60 shadow-lg rounded-[2rem] p-8 text-center flex flex-col items-center gap-6

inputs.default: rounded-2xl border-border bg-white/50 px-4 py-3 text-base focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:border-transparent transition-all placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50

navigation.bar: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-20 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-lg border-t border-white/20 flex items-center justify-around pb-4 pt-2 shadow-[0_-4px_20px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]

motion.guidelines: Animations should be slow, organic, and 'breathing'. No springy/bouncy physics. Use ease-in-out curves.

classes.slide_up: animate-in slide-in-from-bottom-8 fade-in duration-700 ease-out fill-mode-forwards

visual_enhancers.noise_texture: Use a subtle noise SVG overlay on the background at 2% opacity to remove digital flatness.

images.description: Greyscale succulent - texture and grounding for Body category
images.usage: Use as background for Body card with overlay-90 (heavily faded)

images.description: White cup and saucer - warmth and care for Emotion category
images.usage: Use as background for Emotion card with overlay-90

images.description: Tree reflection in water - clarity for Mind category
images.usage: Use as background for Mind card with overlay-90

icons.note: Since RTL, ArrowRight acts as 'Back' arrow pointing to the start of flow visually if not mirrored. Better to use 'ChevronRight' for back in RTL context?

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure 'lucide-react', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge' are installed. Install 'date-fns' for calendar logic.
2. THEME: Implement the 'Daily Sanctuary' theme. Modify 'tailwind.config.js' to add the custom colors (mocha, sage, clay, dusty blue).
3. HEBREW/RTL: Set 'dir=rtl' on the root div/body. Ensure all text is Hebrew. Use the translations: Body=גוף, Emotion=רגש, Mind=mחשבה, Start=התחל, Finish=סיום, History=היסטוריה, Profile=פרופיל.
4. ROUTING: Use simple conditional rendering or 'react-router-dom' if available. Structure: Home (Categories -> Task -> Timer -> Summary) | History | Profile.
5. STORAGE: Create a 'useLocalStorage' hook to persist 'tasks', 'history', and 'user_stats'. No backend calls needed for MVP.
6. COMPONENTS: Create 'CategoryCard', 'Timer', 'DailySummary', 'BottomNav'. Use the visual guidelines for styling.
7. TESTING: Add 'data-testid' to all buttons and cards.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for backgrounds. Use solid soft colors.
Rounded corners should be 'xl' or '2xl' or '3xl'.
All text must be legible against backgrounds (check contrast).
